topic.title: Assignment 10: Substack Bio Update
topic.text:
Hey everyone,

Quick update on Assignment 10: Substack has recently changed their platform. The About page has been replaced with a bio field that has a character limit.

For this assignment, please shorten your 150–200 word About page description to fit within Substack's bio character limit and submit that instead. The content and intent should be the same (a brief intro to you and your publication's focus), just condensed to fit the new format.

No other changes to the assignment. Reach out if you have questions!

 

Best,

Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
